title: The metacognitive design loop
speakers: Jenny Au (Team Lead, UX QA Engineering, Epsilon/Publicis Groupe), Mike Green (Team Lead, Product Design, Epsilon/Publicis Groupe)
key_points: Epsilon's Product Design Team transformed their front-end development workflow by combining Figma's Code Connect and MCP (Model Context Protocol) with generative AI layout creation.
The team built this workflow around their proprietary CORE UI component library, using it as the foundation that ties designs to production-ready code.
The integrated approach significantly accelerated product delivery, shortening the path from design to production and achieving what the team describes as unprecedented development velocity.
